title: 3D Buckets [optifine]
description: This pack makes that buckets have a 3D model
body: This pack makes that buckets have a 3D model, this goes from empty to having a liquid inside (including the one with the fish and the axolotl inside!) Although this pack works fine by itself, it needs Optifine for showing which axolotl variants and even babies ! For Faithful 32x.
